aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Air1st Heating & Cooling due to their strong local presence and reviews, but improvements in structured data and conversational content are needed for better AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer questions and answers.
Expand content to include HowTo guides for common HVAC issues.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but more posts and Q&A engagement could enhance visibility.
critical_issues: No active management of the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data for conversational queries.

ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating detailed HowTo content and obtaining relevant certifications.
